Reserve Bank of New Zealand confirms that its financial stability leadership and functions remain fully operational amid ongoing recruitment.
Reserve Bank of New Zealand has launched a recruitment process for an Assistant Governor to oversee financial stability responsibilities.

data.title: Akeso Advances "IO 2.0 + ADC 2.0" Strategy with Phase II Initiation of Novel ADCs Combined with Ivonescimab and Cadonilimab
data.description: Today, Akeso, Inc. (Stock Symbol: 9926.HK) disclosed that it has obtained approval from the Center for Drug Evaluation (CDE) under China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) to commence Phase II clinical studies for AK146D1 in Hong Kong on March 24, 2026.

The White House has extended the FEMA Review Council, setting its duration to continue until 10 days after the mandated report is delivered to the president or until May 29, 2026, whichever occurs first.
The White House has issued an executive order continuing the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council to maintain oversight and evaluation efforts.

data.title: From SCAN to SPARK: Galaxy Brain Scientific Enables a New Paradigm in Non-invasive, Personalized Precision Treatment for Parkinson's Disease
data.description: On March 24, 2026, a study led by Prof. Hesheng Liu from Galaxy Brain Scientific Inc. revealed in Nature Neuroscience that Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) is effective in treating Parkinson's disease. This research marks a significant step forward in understanding and managing the condition.

data.title: ConsumerDirect Takes Stand to Protect Intellectual Property and Trade Secrets
data.description: A complaint has been filed alleging that MyFreeScoreNow exploited a 10-year partnership to embezzle millions of dollars in business. The lawsuit, brought forth by ConsumerDirect Inc. based in Irvine, California on March 24, 2026, accuses MyFreeScoreNow of misusing trade secrets. ConsumerDirect is a prominent player in offering services to assist individuals in monitoring their credit, finances, and privacy.
China’s Vice Premier Ding highlights landmark innovations across life sciences, materials science, and space science.

data.title: Ethereum enhances security with new ‘Post-Quantum’ team, addressing quantum threat methodically for long-term protection.
data.description: The team affiliated with the Ethereum Foundation, known as Post-Quantum, has recognized the potential threat posed by quantum computing. They have emphasized that although this threat is not immediate, implementing a comprehensive solution that does not disturb the network will be a long process spanning several years.

data.title: Delaware plans to introduce regulations for stablecoin issuers, aiming to attract more digital asset companies.
data.description: Under the proposed plan, stablecoin issuers within the state would be required to obtain state licensing. This initiative aims to enhance Delaware's appeal as a hub for digital asset companies.
Jetstar adjusts schedules amid higher jet fuel prices, says spokesperson.

data.title: From BFA to the World: M&G Marks 20 Years of Telling China's Stationery Story
data.description: The Annual Conference 2026 of the Boao Forum for Asia (BFA) commenced on March 24 in Hainan, China with the theme "Shaping a Shared Future: New Dynamics, New Opportunities, New Cooperation." The designated stationery supplier for the forum, Shanghai M&G, started providing their services. This conference marks an important gathering with numerous participants discussing key issues.
Thailand’s finance minister signals policy support to cushion consumers and businesses from rising fuel costs.
Thailand’s finance minister indicates a shift toward market-based pricing, with energy prices set to align with supply and demand dynamics.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Coco Robotics/
data.description: Coco Robotics has secured the second position in the logistics category on Fast Company's 2026 Most Innovative Companies List. The announcement was made through a news release on 24-Mar-2026 by Coco Robotics via PR Newswire. The company has provided updated information highlighting their noteworthy achievement in the sector.
SK Hynix reports smooth progress in HBM4 supply to customers, indicating stable production and delivery.
SK Hynix: no plan for stock split at present.

Inflation expectations are contained. The Fed is not focused on that. The argument is that reputational pressure and the desire to match Volcker are driving policy more than actual US economic conditions.

data.title: Money talks: investor turnout to set record
data.description: Beijing, 24th March 2026 - The 2026 ZGC International Technology Trade Fair, scheduled to commence on Wednesday afternoon, is anticipating record investor participation. With a focus on advancing global technology exchange, this event aims to attract a significant number of investors worldwide.
